scripts.predev: lsof -ti :3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :10000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: sleep 2 && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "PORT=3001 npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.start: echo 'Запустите backend и frontend: npm run dev:backend и npm run dev:frontend'
